name: Harold J. Callais Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Harold J. Callais Recreation Center in Thibodaux, LA! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include lights, wheelchair accessibility, water, and restrooms.

name: Lockport
description: Lockport is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lockport, LA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Thibodaux Regional Wellness Center
description: Thibodaux Regional Wellness Center is a place to play pickleball in Thibodaux, LA. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Warran J Harang jr Municipal Auditorium
description: Warran J Harang jr Municipal Auditorium is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Thibodaux, LA. There are 2 outdoor concrete and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.
